title: Steve Crespo
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person

|birth=[[Wikipedia:Manhattan|Manhattan]]<ref name="Markdown">{{WebCite|url=https://stevecrespo.com/markdown/|text=My story in a nutshell…|work=Stevecrespo.com|author=Steve Crespo|archivedate=20190608164053}}</ref>

{{Quote|I love the fantastic and the idea that other worlds exist in the corners of our vision or just over our shoulders, and it's that sense of possibility that I try to reflect in my work.|Steve Crespo|<ref name="Official Site">{{OfficialSite|url=http://www.stevecrespo.com|text=Stevecrespo.com|archivedate=20260114040737}}</ref>}}
'''Steve Crespo''' is an artist who worked as one of the pencillers on the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]]. He has also contributed to a number of other comics for [[Dark Horse Comics]].<ref name="Dark Horse Comics Website">{{DarkHorse|url=search/search.php?frompage=userinput&sstring=steve+crespo|text=Dark Horse Comics > Search Results: steve crespo}}</ref><ref name="Omnibus 3">{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-912/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Volume-3|text=Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Vol. 3}}</ref>

Born in [[Wikipedia:Manhattan|Manhattan]], Crespo attended [[Wikipedia:New York City|New York's]] [[Wikipedia:School of Visual Arts|School of Visual Arts]].<ref name="Markdown" /> He has also drawn for [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] and [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC]], and he worked as a character illustrator with [[Wikipedia:Nickelodeon|Nickelodeon]] Creative Resources, eventually going on to lead their East Coast illustration team as Director of Character Art and Illustration.<ref name="Official Site" /> There, he worked on such properties as ''[[Wikipedia:Rugrats|Rugrats]]'' and ''[[Wikipedia:SpongeBob SquarePants|SpongeBob SquarePants]]''. Crespo has also been involved in visual development for animation and children's books.<ref name="Big Chris">{{WebCite|url=https://www.bigchrisart.com/pages/steve-crespo|text=Steve Crespo|work=Big Chris Art|archivedate=20240301074550}}</ref>
